acceptance_criteria: The final draft clearly distinguishes modeled factors from named-but-unmodeled factors.
No new section overstates what the added toy models show.
References, figures, and limitations are synchronized.
The post sounds more complete, not more padded.
constraints: Do not promote a weak or incomplete extension into the evidence chain just to sound comprehensive.
Preserve the post's main structure unless a compelling coherence reason requires reordering.
description: After the scoping, prose, and any new model tasks settle, do one integration pass that rechecks claim-support alignment, figures, references, and limitations language. The result should be a fuller but still disciplined version of the post that names or models the missing layers in proportion to their explanatory value.
goal: Integrate the selected omitted-factor refinements into the post and supporting package without reopening old overclaim problems.
implementation_notes: Completed the final factor-refinement integration pass. Integrated rollover_comparison, external_constraint, and holder_composition into the post without overselling them, updated the audit and README to match the accepted evidence chain, and verified the full simulation suite plus Hugo build.
title: Factor-refinement integration and validation pass
